decisions.title: Use Python standard library for the CLI
decisions.context: The repository needs a portable quality gate without dependency installation risk.
decisions.decision: Implement vibe_coding_infra with Python standard library only.
consequences: Manual validation instead of external jsonschema dependency

decisions.title: Add Knowledge Base/RAG as product-grade infrastructure
decisions.context: The new user goal requires origin_prompt.md to define a dedicated Vibe Coding programming knowledge base as an independent searchable, question-answerable, retrieval-augmented platform and Single Source of Truth.
decisions.decision: Integrate the Knowledge Base/RAG mechanism into origin_prompt.md while preserving existing safety, confirmation, evidence, and execution-slice semantics.
consequences: The final prompt generation path must include the knowledge base platform in the infrastructure panorama.
Knowledge base facts must remain traceable and must not bypass P0/P1 governance.
